news.title: Amazon-backed X-energy files to raise up to $800M in IPO
news.summary: Nuclear startup X-energy hit the road today to sell prospective investors on its initial public offering.

news.summary: Doug Field had stints at Apple and Tesla before joining Ford in 2021.

news.title: Wait, could they still actually break up Live Nation?
news.summary: A federal jury found that Live Nation has acted illegally as a monopoly -- but the company just came to a tentative settlement with the DOJ last month.

news.title: Monarch Tractor’s collapse ends with an acquisition by Caterpillar
news.summary: The startup had faced mounting pressure from dealers, farmers, and a co-founder who complained that Monarch's tech didn't work properly.

news.title: OpenAI updates its Agents SDK to help enterprises build safer, more capable agents
news.summary: OpenAI has expanded the capabilities of its agent-building toolkit, as agentic AI continues to grow in popularity.

news.title: YouTube now lets you turn off Shorts
news.summary: YouTube's time management settings now have an option to put a zero-minute time limit on Shorts, effectively removing them from your app in Android and iOS. news.title: Ford’s EV and software chief Doug Field is leaving the company
news.summary: Ford is shaking things up as it relates to its EV and software teams. Doug Field, who left Apple five years ago to helm Ford's multibillion-dollar bet on electric vehicles and software, is stepping down next month. news.title: Ticketmaster is an illegal monopoly, jury finds
news.summary: Live Nation-Ticketmaster is an illegal monopolist, a Manhattan jury found, according to Bloomberg. news.title: FTC pushes ad agencies into dropping brand safety rules
news.summary: The Federal Trade Commission (FTC) and a group of eight states have announced a proposed settlement with big ad agencies that will prevent them from working together to avoid certain platforms like X based on their political viewpoints. news.summary: It wasn't the first time the surgeon cut out the wrong organ.

news.summary: Google mostly creates products for the web, but it has some new desktop apps today.

news.title: Boston Dynamics’ robot dog now reads gauges and thermometers with Google's AI
news.summary: Google's AI enables robots to read gauges while inspecting industrial facilities.

news.title: ‘Avatar: Aang, The Last Airbender’ Leaked Online. Some Fans Say Paramount Deserves the Fallout
news.summary: After the full movie leaked, animators mourned the chance to release their work as intended. Others feel the leak is justified in light of Paramount’s marketing blunders and association with Trump.

news.title: NASA Wants to Put Nuclear Reactors on the Moon
news.summary: The White House has announced that NASA will work with the Departments of Defense and Energy to put nuclear reactors in orbit and on the surface of the moon.

news.title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
news.summary: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.

news.title: Microsoft Surface PCs Are Getting Big Price Hikes, and the Cheaper Models Are Going Away
news.summary: The price increases range from $200 to $300, and Microsoft doesn’t sell a sub-$1,000 Surface anymore. The rising cost of consumer tech is a common theme in 2026.

news.title: Why Amazon Is Buying Globalstar—and What It Means for Your iPhone
news.summary: Amazon is paying more than $11 billion for a small satellite company.
